chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1724 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A No.6923/25. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh a/w Mushahid Hussain Leghari D.D (Legal) SPSC, Ayaz Ahmed Khoso Assistant Controller SPSC, Mashooque Ali Gopang Assistant Director Legal SPSC. ***************************************** At the very outset, the officials present in Court submit that the compliance in terms of directions containing in order dated 16.10.2025 have been made in presence of the learned counsel for the Petitioner as well as the Petitioner in the office Additional Registrar of this Court. They have submitted that the Petitioner as per interview could not satisfy the expert particularly, hence was deferred accordingly. In view of above circumstances, the Petition is hereby disposed of. However, if any of the candidates who are declared as passed, relinquish or leave the job, the Petitioner being passed candidate shall be accommodated. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
